source_section.title_label_raw: Wind Energy Facility Requirements Wind Energy Facility Prohibition

sections.title_label_raw: Facility Requirements Wind Energy Facility Prohibition

provisions.heading_context_raw: Facility Requirements Wind Energy Facility Prohibition
provisions.text: Wind energy facilities are prohibited in the RPK zone. Watercourse Buffer Requirements for Wind Energy Facilities

sections.title_label_raw: Wind energy facilities shall meet the watercourse buffer requirements

provisions.heading_context_raw: Wind energy facilities shall meet the watercourse buffer requirements
provisions.text: Wind energy facilities shall meet the watercourse buffer requirements of Section 75. Wind Energy Facilities

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be a standalone design, on its own foundation.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: A micro wind energy facility may be roof mounted, supported by guy wires.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: The height of a wind energy facility shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: for a micro wind energy facility, 23.0 metres in height or less;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: for a small wind energy facility, greater than 23.0 metres in height but shall not exceed 35.0 metres in height;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: for a medium wind energy facility, greater than 35.0 metres in height but shall not exceed 60.0 metres in height; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 405(2), any wind energy facility shall be
provisions.text: for a large wind energy facility, greater than 60.0 metres in height. Wind Energy Overlay Zones

sections.title_label_raw: For the purposes of this Part, this By-law establishes the following

provisions.heading_context_raw: For the purposes of this Part, this By-law establishes the following
provisions.text: For the purposes of this Part, this By-law establishes the following wind energy overlay zones, with boundaries as shown on Schedule 48:

provisions.heading_context_raw: For the purposes of this Part, this By-law establishes the following
provisions.text: Urban Wind (UW-1); and

provisions.heading_context_raw: For the purposes of this Part, this By-law establishes the following
provisions.text: Restricted (R). Urban Wind (UW-1) Zone

sections.title_label_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are permitted in the UW-1 zone, as shown on Schedule 48.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: All wind turbines in the UW-1 zone shall be required to be separated from each other by a minimum distance equal to the tallest wind turbine height.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: All wind turbines in the UW-1 zone shall have a minimum setback of 1.0 time the wind turbine height from any lot line.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: Micro wind energy facilities in the UW-1 zone shall be required to be separated from any dwelling on an adjacent lot by no less than 3.0 times the wind turbine height.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: Micro wind energy facilities are permitted on buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: Small wind energy facilities in the UW-1 zone shall be required to be separated from any dwelling on an adjacent lot by no less than 180 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All wind energy facilities, except large wind energy facilities, are
provisions.text: Medium wind energy facilities in the UW-1 zone shall be required to be separated from any dwelling on an adjacent lot by no less than 250 metres. Restricted (R) Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Wind energy facilities are prohibited in the R zone, as shown on

provisions.heading_context_raw: Wind energy facilities are prohibited in the R zone, as shown on
provisions.text: Wind energy facilities are prohibited in the R zone, as shown on Schedule 48. Setback Exemptions

sections.title_label_raw: A wind energy facility's required setback from any lot line is reduced

provisions.heading_context_raw: A wind energy facility's required setback from any lot line is reduced
provisions.text: A wind energy facility's required setback from any lot line is reduced to 0.0 metre where the abutting lot is part of the same wind energy facility. Installation and Design

provisions.heading_context_raw: The wind energy facility shall:
provisions.text: The wind energy facility shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The wind energy facility shall:
provisions.text: be the colour of white, off-white, or gray;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The wind energy facility shall:
provisions.text: not be illuminated, except to the extent required by the Aeronautics Act or by any other applicable authority that regulates air safety; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The wind energy facility shall:
provisions.text: not display any advertising, including flags, streamers, or decorative items, except to identify the wind turbine manufacturer, facility owner, or operator.
